summary: Completed testing of streaming iframe sandbox attribute removal in WatchPage and WatchPartyPage. Verified that sandbox attributes have been successfully removed from streaming iframes, source picker shows all 10 sources, and Try Next functionality works correctly.

Source picker shows all 10 streaming sources - VERIFIED
